hero.heading: Donuts worth waking up for.
hero.subheading: Made from scratch daily — hand-rolled, fried to golden, and glazed fresh every morning.

storefront.caption: Our Elm Street shop, open Tuesday through Saturday.

testimonials.quote: The best old-fashioned glazed I've had in years.
testimonials.author: Priya N.

testimonials.quote: Their maple bacon bar sells out before 8am for a reason.
testimonials.author: Marcus T.
